name: In Memoriam
short_description: Step into a gripping medieval political thriller where intrigue, betrayal, and power struggles shape your fate. As a ghostly detective, you’ll uncover conspiracies, navigate a web of deception and unravel a larger mystery tied to your own demise
detailed_description:
Your death was just the beginning

The Grim Reaper has secrets to share about your untimely demise. Nothing is as it seems, and your death was far from natural.

Listen

Step into a medieval audio drama brought to life by a cast of professional voice actors, including Neil Bell (Dune, Peaky Blinders). Immerse yourself in an intricate web of character-driven storylines that unfold simultaneously. Uncover clues that may either guide you or mislead you—it’s up to you to discern the truth.

Solve

As an unseen spectre, you’ll explore pivotal moments frozen in time, seeking answers to pressing questions. Each revelation unravels a piece of a larger, interconnected mystery—one that ties directly to your own fate.
